## Checklist

* [ ] `make check` passes (lint + validate + test)
* [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
* [ ] If new widget / theme / layout: added a usage example under `examples/`
* [ ] If contract change: opened a discussion first and bumped the major version
